prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to a road alteration project (the A30 from Chiverton to Carland Cross) located in England, which falls under the jurisdiction of National Highways Limited. The Land Compensation Act 1973 applies to England, enabling individuals with qualifying interests in affected land to claim compensation due to depreciation in value caused by the alterations.
